Summer School
2026 AI+Science Summer School
The goal of the program is to introduce a new generation of diverse, interdisciplinary graduate students and postdocs to the emerging field of AI+Science. We also hope this program can build community across institutions and spur new research directions focused on AI-enabled scientific discovery across the physical and biological sciences.
The program is organized by the [Eric and Wendy Schmidt AI in Science Fellowship](https://aiscience.uchicago.edu) program at the University of Chicago and the [University of Chicago Data Science Institute](http://datascience.uchicago.edu). The AI+Science Summer School is co-hosted by the [National Institute for Theory and Mathematics in Biology (NITMB)](https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://www.nitmb.org/about__) and [NSF-Simons AI Institute for the Sky SkAI Institute](https://skai-institute.org). Applications are due April 22.
For more information including speakers and a link to register, click [here](https://forms.gle/fzLtqxZA9iUX97YZ6).

The goal of the program is to introduce a new generation of diverse, interdisciplinary graduate students and postdocs to the emerging field of AI+Science. We also hope this program can build community across institutions and spur new research directions focused on AI-enabled scientific discovery across the physical and biological sciences.

The program is organized by the [Eric and Wendy Schmidt AI in Science Fellowship](https://aiscience.uchicago.edu) program at the University of Chicago and the [University of Chicago Data Science Institute](http://datascience.uchicago.edu). The AI+Science Summer School is co-hosted by the [National Institute for Theory and Mathematics in Biology (NITMB)](https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://www.nitmb.org/about__) and [NSF-Simons AI Institute for the Sky SkAI Institute](https://skai-institute.org). # Summer School
## 2026 AI+Science Summer School
The goal of the program is to introduce a new generation of diverse, interdisciplinary graduate students and postdocs to the emerging field of AI+Science. We also hope this program can build community across institutions and spur new research directions focused on AI-enabled scientific discovery across the physical and biological sciences.
The program is organized by the [Eric and Wendy Schmidt AI in Science Fellowship](https://aiscience.uchicago.edu) program at the University of Chicago and the [University of Chicago Data Science Institute](http://datascience.uchicago.edu). The AI+Science Summer School is co-hosted by the [National Institute for Theory and Mathematics in Biology (NITMB)](https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://www.nitmb.org/about__) and [NSF-Simons AI Institute for the Sky SkAI Institute](https://skai-institute.org). Applications are due April 22.
For more information including speakers and a link to register, click [here](https://forms.gle/fzLtqxZA9iUX97YZ6).
